claims: The built simulator app launched and produced a non-empty launch-surface screenshot for en, es, fr, ar, and zh-Hans.
The screenshots are preserved as repo-managed evidence with SHA-256 hashes.
The proof is limited to representative locale launch surfaces.
source_caveats: The source smoke JSON files report repo.dirty=yes because the smoke run happened before the automation/doc handoff commit.
The dirty paths during source capture were automation and documentation files, not app source or localization resources.

The first smoke-run screenshots caught the white launch transition. The preserved screenshots were recaptured from the same installed simulator app after relaunching each locale and waiting for the Today surface to settle.

artifacts.proves: English baseline locale launch surface rendered after app launch.
Spanish locale launch surface rendered after app launch.
French locale launch surface rendered after app launch.
Arabic locale launch surface rendered after app launch with right-to-left locale launch arguments.
Simplified Chinese locale launch surface rendered after app launch.
